jobs.title: Senior UX Engineer (Marketing)
jobs.content: <p><strong>About the Team:</strong></p><p>At Netlify, our mission is to empower developers to move faster with solutions that are intuitive, powerful, and a joy to use.&nbsp;As a Senior UX Engineer, you'll drive the experience across our marketing site and product app &mdash; spending the majority of your time on Netlify&rsquo;s marketing site, shaping how millions of developers discover and adopt the Netlify Edge Network, Netlify Functions, Netlify Edge Functions, Netlify Forms, Netlify Identity, Netlify Build, and Netlify Connect product lines.</p><p>You&rsquo;ll partner with Design, Product, and Engineering to ship marketing-page experiences that load fast on the Netlify Edge Network, instrument them with Netlify Analytics, and deploy them through Netlify Build &mdash; using the same Jamstack tooling our customers rely on every day.</p>

jobs.title: Your Chance to Join Our Talent Community!
jobs.content: <p>Don't see a role that fits today? Join the Netlify Talent Community to stay close to future openings across the General &amp; Administrative function &mdash; covering People Operations, Legal, Finance, and IT &mdash; and be the first to hear when we open Netlify roles aligned to your background.</p>
